insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +0.7% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -3.0%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-05 vs 06-28 = -0.7% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 06-28 vs 06-21 = -12.9% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCP surging (+2.1% vs upstream -5.8%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCP +2.1% vs upstream -5.8% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: App split — App Total Revenue +3.5% concentrated in YCP — not platform-wide.
insights.body: App Total Revenue +3.5% is uneven by app (All App +3.5%, YMK +0.3%, YCP +6.4%) — driven mainly by YCP, not a platform-wide shift.

insights.title: Data gap — 3 slice(s) missing data — excluded from analysis.
insights.body: 3 slice(s) n/a (missing data): All App·All·App Total Install, YCP·All·App Total Install, YMK·All·App Total Install.
